description:
Are you training a “high energy” dog right now? Tell me about them in the comments!!

Get instant access to my free 30 day training guide HERE: https://pupford.com/training


SOURCE

Maria Toscano Batista, Catarina Lavrador, Gonçalo da Graça-Pereira, Excessive energy in dogs: The impact of caregiver-related variables and fear/anxiety, Applied Animal Behaviour Science, Volume 296, 2026, 106900, ISSN 0168-1591, https://doi.org/10.1016/j.applanim.2025.106900
title: How to Train a High Energy Dog Who Doesn’t Listen
